description: CompositionGrey track pants made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, with an elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, adidas patented 3-Stripes in pink from the waistband to the hem, and embroidered brand name on the left legFitComfort Wash careNormal wash cold inside out at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach or dry cleanLine dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsChosen from the adidas fitness and sportswear range for women, these track pants add style to your look while you focus on performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these cotton-lycra pants allow easy movement and does not lose shape even after years of wear.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'9" and waist 26"
